author: y4rr
content:
Result: C9.2 conformance suite complete.

Deliverables:
- scripts/regenerate_nn_norm_fixtures.py — 149 fixtures, exits 0 (torch 2.11.0 pin)
- ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance/fixtures/nn_norm_activation_loss.json — 149 fixtures across 54 ops
- ferrotorch-nn/tests/conformance_nn_norm_activation_loss.rs — 54 tests, 54/54 pass, 0 warnings

Modules covered (7):
1. norm: LayerNorm, GroupNorm, BatchNorm1d/2d/3d, InstanceNorm1d/2d, RMSNorm (8 tests)
2. activation: ReLU, ReLU6, Sigmoid, Tanh, GELU exact/tanh, SiLU, Softmax, LogSoftmax, ELU, SELU, Mish, LeakyReLU, HardSigmoid, HardSwish, Softplus, LogSigmoid, Hardtanh (18 tests)
3. loss: MSELoss, L1Loss, BCELoss, BCEWithLogitsLoss, CrossEntropyLoss, NLLLoss — mean/sum/none (6 tests)
4. init: zeros, ones, constant, xavier_uniform, xavier_normal, kaiming_uniform, kaiming_normal, uniform, normal (9 tests)
5. functional: linear, relu, sigmoid, tanh, gelu, silu, softmax, log_softmax, leaky_relu, mse_loss (10 tests)
6. lazy_norm: LazyBatchNorm1d (1 test)
7. utils: clip_grad_norm_, clip_grad_value_ (2 tests)

No cascade bugs found — all 54 tests pass at expected tolerances.
Cascade-skip function left in file for future use pattern.
